message:
harness infrastructure: rename GapReason variants and fix manifest formatting

scenario_coverage_drift_gate_runner.rs:
- Rename GapReason enum variants to follow Rust naming conventions where
  the noun-first style reads more naturally in pattern matches:
    MissingScenarioMapping -> ScenarioMappingMissing
    MissingRequiredExecutionLane -> RequiredExecutionLaneMissing
    MissingCatalogEntryForManifestScenario -> CatalogEntryAbsentForManifestScenario
  The Display impl and all usage sites in build_report() are updated to
  match. The serialized string output (e.g. "missing_scenario_mapping")
  is preserved unchanged via the existing Display implementation so that
  downstream JSON consumers see no breaking change.

validation_manifest.rs:
- Break a long chained field access
  `manifest.logging_conformance.shell_script_conformance.bead_id`
  across multiple lines so each accessor is on its own line, improving
  readability in the validation condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
